productDisplayName: Quiksilver Men Brown No Offence Belt
description: Crafted from pure leather, this quiksilver belt has a refined finish complemented by its smart buckle. The styling on this belt makes it a must-have in your wardrobe!Length at the largest setting: 98 cmMade of two tone 60% buffalo leather and 40% bonded leather with a smooth upper Tang clasp with a fixed loop to offer a snug Fit and to hold the belt in placeBold embossed branding on the upperCareUse a brass polish to maintain buckle shineUse a branded leather conditioner to protect the belt
